title: Spring View
description: Du Fu surveys the ruins of the capital during the An Lushan Rebellion: the nation is shattered, but mountains and rivers remain.
introduction: Du Fu surveys the ruins of the capital during the An Lushan Rebellion: the nation is shattered, but mountains and rivers remain.

translation.original_text: 國破山河在，城春草木深。感時花濺淚，恨別鳥驚心。
translation.text: The nation shattered, mountains and rivers remain. In the city in spring, grass and trees grow deep. Moved by the times, flowers bring tears. Hating separation, birds startle the heart.
